name: Standing Knee Raise Stretch
shortDescription: A stretch that targets the hip flexors and glutes by pulling one knee toward the chest while standing.
instructions: Stand upright and balance on one foot. Lift one knee up toward your chest, grasping it with both hands and pulling gently until you feel a stretch in the hip and glute. Hold briefly, lower, and repeat on the other leg.
steps: Lift one knee toward your chest.
Grasp your knee with both hands.
Pull the knee gently toward your chest, feeling the stretch.
Hold, then lower and repeat on the opposite leg.
formCues: Use arms to pull knee gently
breathing: Exhale as you pull the knee up, inhale as you release.
